infoPlist.NSLocationWhenInUseUsageDescription: BeePlan uses your location for category-based location reminders and to alert you when you are near a friend for a person reminder. Your location is shared only as proximity — never exact coordinates.

plugins.locationWhenInUsePermission: BeePlan uses your location for category-based location reminders and to alert you when you are near a friend for a person reminder. Your location is shared only as proximity — never exact coordinates.

plugins.microphonePermission: BeePlan uses your microphone to record voice reminders for the AI assistant.
